name: Knosys Limited
summary: Knosys Limited develops, licenses, and sells computer software in Australia. The company also provides Software-as-a-Service KIQ Cloud product, a cloud-based omni-channel knowledge management solution that is designed to simplify and centralize the organizing and sharing of knowledge; and Knowledge IQ, an enterprise solution, which provides personalized information to staff that will transform business productivity and engagement. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is based in Melbourne, Australia.
